description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-dropdown` (T2-10) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dropdown/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, trigger slot vs prop typed, placement typed, open prop typed
2. Accessibility — trigger has aria-expanded/aria-haspopup, menu has correct role, keyboard: Enter/Space opens, Arrow Down moves to first item, Escape closes, axe-core pass
3. Tests — open/close, keyboard nav, click-outside, all placements, disabled trigger, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — dropdown with menu, with custom content, all placements
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts (trigger, panel)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dropdown/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-dropdown — T2-10 antagonistic quality review
